packet_id: # packet_id             = unique byte ID for this packet type (0-255)
# packet_name           = human readable name for logging
# handler_class         = fully qualified class that handles this packet
# handler_method        = static method on that class
# max_size_bytes        = packets larger than this are rejected
# requires_ack          = 1 means client must confirm receipt
# max_retries           = how many times to resend if no ack received
# max_move_speed        = max units per second allowed (0 = no validation)
# max_damage            = max damage value allowed (0 = no validation)
# max_interaction_range = max range in units for interactions (0 = no validation)
# reject_action         = what to do on validation failure: ignore / kick / disconnect
# priority              = lower number fires first (0 = highest priority)
# reliable              = 1 means packet must arrive in order
# enabled               = 1 to enable this packet type
# log                   = 1 to log this packet type
